description: Remember a preference stated across conversation turns

turns.content: I always prefer dark mode in my editors
Noted! I'll keep that in mind.
Can you set up my VS Code config?
What theme should you use for my editor?

description: Track a decision made during discussion

turns.content: We need to choose between PostgreSQL and MySQL for the new service
PostgreSQL offers better JSON support and extensions.
Good point. Let's go with PostgreSQL then.
Remind me what database we chose for the new service?

description: Remember a technical detail from earlier

turns.content: The staging server is at 10.0.1.50 port 8443
Got it.
Can you deploy the latest build?
What's the staging server address?
Our CI runs on Jenkins
Noted.
Actually wait, we migrated to GitHub Actions last month
What CI system do we use?
The API base URL is https://api.example.com
Got it.
And the auth endpoint is /oauth/token
What's the full auth endpoint URL?

description: Remember and apply a constraint across contexts

turns.content: Never commit directly to main branch. Always use feature branches.
Understood — all changes via feature branches.
I want to push a quick hotfix
What's the rule about committing to main?

description: Track evolving state across many turns

turns.content: Sprint 12 starts today. Goals: auth module and API docs
Sprint 12 tracked.
Auth module is done, moving to API docs now
Great progress!
API docs also finished. Sprint 12 complete!
What was accomplished in sprint 12?

description: Distinguish similar facts from different time periods

turns.content: Current deployment target: Kubernetes 1.24
Noted.
We upgraded to Kubernetes 1.28 this week
What Kubernetes version are we on?
Alice handles frontend, Bob handles backend, Carol does DevOps
Team noted.
Who should I talk to about the deployment pipeline?

description: Handle ambiguous update without losing context

turns.content: Database connection pool is set to 50
Noted.
We're seeing connection exhaustion, increase pool to 200
Updated.
Also the read replica pool should stay at 50
What are our connection pool settings?
